reviews.comment:
No me gustó la atención tanto en el shop como los playeros. Mala gestados y sin ganas de atender al público. Les puse dos estrellas para no ser despiadado.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the service, neither in the shop nor from the beachgoers. They were poorly managed and seemed unwilling to help customers. I gave them two stars to avoid being too harsh.

reviews.comment:
Un prestador de servicios completo enclavado en el medio de la Villa Cabecera de Puerto Pirámide, con lo suficiente para abastecerte en las necesidades de tu vehículo y propias.

Cuenta con sanitarios en servicio y bien higienizados.

Su playa de carga de combustibles y maniobras, no es muy amplia pero es suficiente para el tráfico que allí se concentra. Luce despejada, bien señalizada, ordenada y limpia.

El Shop, cuenta con espacios para consumo e impresiona bien abastecido, limpio y ordenado. es de reducidas dimensiones, pero le sobra surtido en lo más básico de lo que el ocasional visitante ha de necesitar.

Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
A full-service provider nestled in the heart of the main town of Puerto Pirámide, with enough to meet your vehicle's and personal needs.

It has fully functioning and well-sanitized restrooms.

Its fuel loading and maneuvering area isn't very large, but it's sufficient for the traffic that gathers there. It appears uncluttered, well-signposted, orderly, and clean.

The shop has spaces for consumption and is impressively well-stocked, clean, and organized. It's small in size, but well-stocked with the most basic items the occasional visitor might need.

Recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNGN2ZmdRRRAB
